creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
I am trying to su to root under FreeBSD under 2.2 Release and I receive a
message that I am not in the correct group. My id gives:
uid=1000(pedro) gid=0(wheel) groups=0(wheel), 31(guest)
but my name wasn't added in /etc/group

How-To-Repeat: add a user with adduser, and attempt to su to root.
